ham.subject: Your Amazon Order Confirmation – Order #123-4567890-1234567
ham.body:
Hello Jane Doe,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon. We are pleased to confirm your order #123-4567890-1234567.

Items:
1x Echo Dot (4th Gen) – $49.99
2x Fire TV Stick – $29.99 each

Subtotal: $109.97
Shipping: $4.99
Total: $114.96

Your items will ship from: 123 Main St, Springfield, IL 62704
Estimated delivery: 2026-04-04 to 2026-04-06

If you need to cancel or modify your order, please visit <URL> or call 1-800-280-4331.

Thank you for choosing Amazon.

Best regards,
Amazon.com

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice Payment Required – Action Needed Within 24 Hours
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We have detected an outstanding invoice from QuickBooks for your Norton subscription. Invoice #QB-INV-2026-045 is overdue as of 2026-04-01. Failure to settle within 48 hours may result in suspension of services and potential legal action.

Please confirm your payment by clicking <URL> and entering your account details. If you have already paid, reply to this email with your transaction ID.

For immediate assistance, call us at 1-800-123-4567.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
QuickBooks Billing Department
